tasks.label: 确保模拟器已启动 (Pixel_9_Pro)
args: $adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe"; $emu = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Android\Sdk\emulator\emulator.exe"; $running = & $adb devices | Select-String 'emulator'; if (-not $running) { Write-Host '[1/3] 正在启动模拟器 Pixel_9_Pro ...'; Start-Process $emu -ArgumentList '-avd Pixel_9_Pro'; Write-Host '[2/3] 等待设备上线...'; & $adb wait-for-device; $boot = ''; while ($boot -ne '1') { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $boot = (& $adb shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>$null).Trim() }; Write-Host '[3/3] 模拟器已就绪！' } else { Write-Host '模拟器已在运行，跳过启动。' }
